Help
❓ Help & Guide
🔑 Change Password
📨 Material Requisition Tracker
Pick a Customer / Temp PO to see every material requisition raised against it — the materials, quantities, and current status (🏪 In Store · 🚚 Dispatched · 🛒 In Purchase · ⏳ Other). Open 💬 Messages on any requisition to chat with the store/engine.
💬 Messages
🧰 Tools Store — Network & Master
Your permanent tool network. Mother store (Wazirpur) supplies big sites and the child stores (MSIL Manesar / Gurgaon / Kharkhoda, SMG Gujarat), which run small day-to-day site work. Every tool is a unique tag, kept at a storage spot, and tracked wherever it goes.
—
Total Tools
—
In Mother Store
—
In Child Stores
—
Out at Sites
—
In Repair
🏪 Stores Network
📄 Import from Invoice (AI)
Upload a supplier tool invoice (PDF or photo). AI reads every line, classifies each as 🔧 Tool or 🧪 Consumable, and you confirm — no manual typing.
➕ Add / Receive Tool
📤 Bulk Upload Tools
Got a big existing inventory? Download the template, fill one row per tool, and upload. Existing tags are skipped — nothing is duplicated.
🔧 Tools
Loading…
🔧 Issue / Return / Transfer
Issue sends a tool from a store out to a site. Return brings it back from a site into a store (tick repair if it needs servicing). Transfer moves a tool between stores — e.g. Mother → a child store.
📤 Issue — Store → Site (with Challan)
Select Tools to Issue
Selected: 0 tools • ₹0
📥 Return — Site → Store
🔁 Transfer — Store → Store
🛠️ Send for Repair
⚠️ Mark Lost / Scrapped
Use when a tool is lost or damaged beyond repair, at a site or in store. It's removed from active stock & value but kept in the tool's history.
🧾 Recent Movements
Loading…
📄 Challans
Every issue challan generated — upload the signed/received copy against each.
Loading…
📋 Tool Request
A site or child store raises a request for the tools it needs, and names which store should supply. Add one line per tool type with the quantity, then submit.
📧 Test Email Alert
Send a sample alert email to any address to confirm live alerts are working — no need to set up keepers or raise a real request.
➕ Raise Request
Tools Needed
📑 Requests

One view of your whole inventory: total tools by category, how many are free in stores, what's allotted to each site, and what's in repair.

Your inventory segregated into tool groups — totals, what's free, out at sites, in repair, and owned value per group.

Depreciated Value
Owned tools only (leased excluded), excluding lost/scrapped. Based on purchase date, or date added if none. Approximate — an internal asset view, not a statutory valuation.
🏪 Free Stock by Store
Loading…
📦 Stock by Category — Free & Allotment per Site
Each row is a tool category. Columns show free stock, how many are out at each site, in repair, and the total.
Loading…
📍 Tool Locator — Live Locations
Real-time exact location of every tool — which hub (and rack) or which site each one is sitting at, right now. Search a tag, filter by category or location, or switch to the grid view to see tools × locations like a map.

🧪 Consumables
Quantity-based items — discs, blades, electrodes, bits, etc. Track stock per store, issue to sites, and get reorder flags when stock runs low.

📤 Bulk Upload Consumables
Load many consumables at once. Download the template, fill one row per item (with opening stock & store), then upload. Existing item names are skipped — nothing duplicated.

🔒 Tool Hub — Held Stock (MD Approval)
Tools received but not yet released for issue — high-value, fresh stock, or reserved for a special project. They stay out of the issue list until the MD approves their release.

🛂 Shutdown 2026 — MSIL Gate Pass
Reads your existing Worker Master. Fill each worker's gate-pass gaps once, then generate the MSIL Annexure-A, Annexure-1 & Declaration. A worker is Pass Ready only when all mandatory fields and documents are complete — 18+ is enforced.
📤 Bulk Fill from Excel
Fill many workers at once. Download the template (it comes pre-loaded with your current workers), fill the blank cells, then upload. Rows are matched by Worker ID; blank cells are skipped, nothing is overwritten with empty.
—
Pass Ready

Incomplete

Annexure-1 — Contractor (used in every generated document)
Declaration details (per submission)
Only Pass Ready workers are included in Annexure-A. Sign & seal the Declaration before submitting to MSIL Vigilance.

📋 Tomorrow's Plan
Tomorrow's Plan is for site supervisors (submit) and admin/manager (run).
🚚 Move Crew
Set each worker's new site individually (or leave as “stay”). Most going to the same place? Use Set all rows, then tweak the exceptions. Punch-point men: leave them on “stay”. Each move logs a transfer; past muster & cost stay as history.

Crew at —

Quick fill →
Pick a From site.
🗂️ Sites Status
Active = full running · Dormant = winding down / punch points only (still works for muster & moves) · Closed = done (drops off all lists). Worker count shows who's still on each site — clear them before closing.

⚡ Quick Actions

⚡ Quick Actions

📋 Today's Checklist

⚠️ Critical: Get written WC coverage confirmation from Customer before deploying more manpower.
🗂️ Site Jobs
Job breakdown for non-civil sites (fabrication & installation). A parent job is the heading that buckets its child jobs; each child carries the crew — workers & wages pulled from Worker Master. Plan crew up to 30 days ahead; track planned vs actual cost.
Select a site.
🖨️ Open Sites — Supervisors & Engine

Active Sites Directory

⏳ Loading…
🏗️ Site Management
🗂️ Site Jobs
Parent/child job breakdown & crew planning for non-civil sites
Open ▶
Add new sites and assign supervisors to sites. Only Admin can do this.

Add New Site

All Sites

Loading...

🏪 Site Type — Civil / Store / Factory

Set what kind of site this is. Store sites get the Store module (Stock, Inward, Transfer) and the company-wide part list; they also appear in every store picker. Factory sites get the Factory module (Job Master, Factory DPR, WIP, OT). Changing this updates how the system treats the site immediately.

⏱️ Factory OT Multiplier

Set the overtime multiplier for each factory site. Applied when worker hours exceed shift hours in Factory DPR.
Formula: OT Cost = (Daily Rate ÷ 8) × OT Hours × Multiplier

📊 Assign Work Package Template to Site

Assign a DPR work template to each site. Supervisors will see activities from this template in Daily Muster.

🔑 Set Primary Supervisor

Only the Primary Supervisor can add/edit data. Others on same site can view only. Manager can change Primary anytime.

👤 Assign Supervisor to Site

Loading...

⚙️ Assign Manager to Engine

Managers see all sites under their engine(s). Pick a manager + an engine and click Add — repeat to give one manager multiple engines. Remove an engine with its ✕, or Clear all. Scoping turns on in a later step — assigning now is safe.
Loading...

🎖️ Promote / Demote — Engine Owner ↔ Manager

Pick a person and set their role. Engine Owner owns the engine (sees & edits its sites); Manager runs it day-to-day. This sets ownership, role and engine automatically — no SQL. Admin/Store/Purchase are never changed. The person must log out & back in for it to take effect.

👥 Set / Change User Role

Define a role for any email — no SQL. To create a brand-new login, also enter a Temp Password (works because email confirmation is off); leave it blank if the login already exists. For Supervisor pick a site; for Manager / Engine Owner pick an engine; for Store Keeper pick a store. Person must log out & back in.
🚗 Conveyance Reimbursement
Business travel reimbursement under APM 2.0. Declare your profile once (Engine Owner approves), then log one claim per day. Own/Facilitated vehicle = per-km by policy; hired transport (public / Rapido / Ola-Uber / private) must be pre-approved by the Engine Owner before you travel. Every claim is approved by the Engine Owner, then paid by Accounts.

🪪 My Travel Profile

Daily commute = Home→Base→Home = 2 × the distance above. Declared address stays valid 6 months. Distances per Google Maps shortest route.

＋ New Daily Claim

Hired transport must be pre-approved before travel. Submit the estimate now; after the Engine Owner pre-approves and you travel, open the claim to add the actual fare + bill.
🍽️ Meals (fixed allowance)
MSIL site — using canteen card means no cash claim:

✅ Approvals (Profiles & Claims)

Profile Declarations
Travel Claims

💵 Approved — Pay

📋 My Claims

💵 Advance Request
Raise an advance / imprest → it gets approved → Accounts records the payment → you submit bills to reconcile. Status updates at each step; balances post to the ledger only when payment is confirmed.

＋ Raise Advance Request

✈️ Outstation Travel Details
📋 Official Purpose — Detailed Estimate (required)
Break down exactly what this advance will be spent on. The amount above is set to the estimate total.

Estimate Total: ₹0

📋 My Requests

💰 Accounts — Advances & Loans
Manual ledger for money given to and recovered from staff, workers and contractors. Balances are always derived from entries, so advance / loan reconciliation is always up to date.
₹0
Net Outstanding
₹0
Total Given
₹0
Total Recovered
0
Parties w/ Balance

＋ New Entry

🍽️ Conveyance Meal Allowance Rates

Fixed per-meal allowances applied to daily conveyance claims. Only Accounts can change these.

✈️ Outstation Travel Policy (by Band)

Per-band daily caps & entitlements for outstation reimbursement. Bands appear in the Advance Request outstation form. Only Accounts can change these.
Band / GradeHotel/night ₹Food/day ₹Local/day ₹Own-car ₹/kmMisc/day ₹Train classFlight

📜 Activity Log
Every entry, edit and delete by any user is logged here with date & time. Records auto-delete after 24 hours.

Recent Activity — 0

🏠 Worker Room Rent
Room rent paid to workers for site postings / extra allowance. Engine Owner raises → Managing Director approves → Accounts or MD marks paid. Tracked separately here — filter by worker, month or status.

＋ Raise Room Rent

🏠 Room Rent Register

🧾 Bill Approvals & Reimbursements
Flow: Submit → Engine Owner review → Accounts review → MD approval → Accounts pays. It posts to the khata ledger only when paid. Any stage can send a bill back with a reason.

🧾 Bills Queue

✅ Engine Owner — Approvals Required
Everything currently waiting on an Engine Owner: advances, bill reviews, conveyance reviews and material requisitions. Tap a row's button to open the right page and act.

⏳ Waiting on EO

🛡️ MD Approvals
Items that need the MD's decision: special / above-₹10,000 advances, bills & conveyance after Accounts review, and worker room rent.

⏳ Waiting on MD

🧾 Invoice Register
Invoices are made in Tally — Accounts logs them here against the Customer PO so the Engine Owner and MD see PO vs invoiced vs balance in one place.

➕ Log Invoice (from Tally)

📋 Worker Onboarding & Compliance Form APM/HR/WOF/002
A · BASIC WORKER INFORMATION
B · TRADE, SKILL CLASSIFICATION & INTERNAL GRADE
Grades: E=Electrical · M=Mechanical · W=Welding · H=Helper · R=Rigger · G=Grinder · GC=Gas Cutter · S=Supervisor · (1=Entry, 2=Experienced, 3=Senior)
TradeAssigned GradeYrs ExpCertTestVerifiedRemarks
C · EXPERIENCE & CERTIFICATIONS
D · MEDICAL FITNESS & STATUTORY DECLARATIONS
I am medically fit and have no condition affecting my work ability.
I am not under treatment for any chronic illness / psychiatric disorder.
I do not consume alcohol, drugs, or any intoxicating substance.
I am not allergic to PPE materials or industrial chemicals used on site.
I am aware of my right to report occupational illness / injury without fear.
I consent to random alcohol / drug testing as per site policy.
E / F / I · POLICY ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS
Mobile Phone Policy (Zero Tolerance): Smartphones / camera devices are strictly prohibited on the shopfloor & restricted zones; phones to be deposited before each shift. Violation = immediate removal + contractor penalty.
POSH Policy: Worker will treat all persons with respect; will not indulge in any harassment (verbal/physical/visual/electronic); will report incidents to ICC / Safety / HR. False/malicious complaints attract action; all complaints confidential, no retaliation.
Confidentiality / Blacklist: Worker will not disclose any drawings, technical/customer/business data; understands unauthorized disclosure attracts civil/criminal liability; may be blacklisted for misconduct/theft/fraud/harassment; confirms all info given is true.
G · PPE ISSUE RECORD
PPE ItemIssuedSize / QtyCondition
H · SAFETY INDUCTION & TOOLBOX TALK
ModuleCompletedDate
J · SUPERVISOR APPROVAL & FINAL AUTHORIZATION
1. Aadhaar / ID documents verified & copy retained
2. Skill & trade certificate verified
3. Medical fitness certificate checked
4. ESI / PF enrollment confirmed or initiated
5. Safety induction & all training modules completed
6. POSH policy explained and signed
7. Mobile phone deposit policy signed
8. Confidentiality declaration signed
9. PPE issued and condition recorded
10. Skill grade assessed and assigned
11. No pending disciplinary issues from previous contractor
12. Site entry badge / ID card issued
✍️ WORKER SIGNATURE / THUMB IMPRESSION
Worker confirms all information is true and agrees to all the above policies. Sign below with finger / thumb.
✅ Manpower Approvals
Workers added by HR wait here for your approval. Approve to make them live (markable in muster & payroll). Pending workers do not appear in muster until approved.
Loading…
🎯 Assign & Estimate
Pick the job and trade. The system churns all workers across every site, checks who is eligible by skill level, and shows the estimated time & cost for each — ranked cheapest first. Numbers are plain formulas (auditable) and will tune themselves as you log real jobs.

Job details

Eligible workers — ranked

📒 Log job result (feeds the learning)

Abnormal jobs (bad material/access) are logged but don't affect the worker's learned speed.

🔔 Re-grade suggestions

system recommends · you approve

🛡️ WC / Insurance
Get written WC confirmation from Customer NOW.

Coverage Checklist

QuestionStatusDetails
Written WC policy confirmation from Customer
APM manpower covered under PRW scope
Sum insured per worker
Subcontractors included?
Key exclusions reviewed

Email Template

Subject: Confirmation of WC Policy Coverage — APM Manpower at [Site Name] Dear [Customer Project Manager], This is to request written confirmation that manpower deployed by APM under PRW scope at [Project Site] is covered under the site's Workmen Compensation (WC) policy. Kindly share: 1. WC Policy Number and Insurer Name 2. Coverage: Sum insured per worker (death / permanent disability) 3. Confirmation APM subcontractors and workers are included 4. Key exclusions 5. Claims contact person / number Request your response by [date]. Regards, [APM Representative] | APM

🧮 Fabrication Tools
Steel & metal weight calculator + standard-section reference. Exact formula-based weights — no more googling. Inside a Customer Hub quotation, use 🧮 Weight Calc to drop a costed weight straight into a quote line.
🧮 Weight Calculator
📦 Document Backup
Backs up every file in your apm-documents bucket (drawings, invoices, site photos) to a folder on this computer. Re-run any time — it only copies new/changed files. Use Chrome or Edge on a computer (not mobile).
⚠️ This browser can't save files to a folder. Open APM in Chrome or Edge on a desktop/laptop to use one-click backup.
🔄 Job Work — Subcontracting (Send Out)
Send material to a vendor for processing (laser cut, bending, powder coat…). Creates a GST Delivery Challan linked to a factory job. Goods must return within 1 year.

➕ New Send-Out Challan

🏭 Internal PO — Engine to Factory
Engines raise internal POs to the factory for fabrication work. Each references a Customer PO. The factory confirms receipt + delivery date, or requests changes.
📌 All technical, commercial & other communication regarding any IPO must be done via 💬 Annexures (attachments) inside that IPO — date-stamped, with a message to the factory each time.

As the engine owner, requisitions you raise are auto-approved (you are the approver) and go straight to the store.

🌐 Customer Hub — CRM
Key-account CRM for the MSIL ecosystem (E3+E4 shared Ariba pipeline) and direct-sales engines. Each engine sees its own customer pool; the MSIL group is shared by E3 & E4.

A list of your customers with their address and GST. Reusable across customer POs.

⚙️ Engine Master
Engines are sub-units of APM owned by an engine owner. One engine spans many sites and many customer orders. Assign sites to an engine in Site Management. Customer PO and Job No live on the individual jobs/sites, not the engine.

🔩 New Part

📦 Opening Balance (optional — only for new parts; leave blank if none)
Opening stock is recorded at the Storage Location selected above. For later receipts, use Material Inward.
⚠️ Tally Part Code & Description must match Tally exactly.
📐 Material Planning (MRP)
Plan a production target (e.g. 5 × Structure A). The system explodes the BOM through all sub-assembly levels, adds wastage, checks total free (unassigned) stock pooled across all sites, and shows what you must buy. Material already assigned to an engine is treated as committed and is not counted. This is a planning aid for purchasing — it does not change stock or jobs.

▶ Run a Plan

Material Requirement

🏗️ BOM Builder
Define what a product is made of. A BOM line can be a raw part or another product (sub-assembly) — sub-assemblies explode further during planning. Default wastage is 2% per line (editable).

＋ Create / Edit BOM

Components

🔩 Part Master
Admin creates parts here. Tally Part Code and Description must match Tally exactly for correct integration.

Loading...

📤 Excel Upload Preview

📦 Direct Material Receipt — Supplier / GRN
Use this ONLY for material delivered directly to the factory by a supplier (e.g. against a Purchase PO) that did not come through a store requisition. Do not use this for material issued from the store — confirm that with the "Confirm Received" button on the Material Requisition page, otherwise the job's material cost will be counted twice.

👷 Assign Workers
Select workers and enter hours on this job only. System tracks total hours across all jobs. OT beyond shift requires Manager approval.

⏱️ Overtime Detected

⚠️ OT request will be sent to Manager for approval. Workers show Pending OT in muster until approved.
📋 Material Requisition
Raise a material request to the store. Auto-generates Req No. Store will issue material at avg rate.

＋ New Requisition

Parts Required (up to 15)

Click Load to view requisitions
📥 Material Inward
Record goods received into store from supplier. Stock and average rate update automatically.

＋ New Inward Entry

📦 Items Received
Add every part in this delivery — one GRN covers them all. No supplier part code? Search by description; the system remembers each supplier's items after the first time.
Part (your code — description)Supplier CodeFor EngineUnitQtyRate ₹Total
📊 One GRN for the whole delivery · stock & average rate update per line · each line tagged to its own engine · supplier's wording saved for audit.

⚖️ Stock Adjustment
Add opening / found stock or correct quantities for an existing part at a chosen store. Separate from Material Inward (purchases). Admin / Planning only — every adjustment is logged.

⚖️ Receipt Disputes — Issued vs Received
When the factory confirms receiving less than the store issued, the gap is held here as in transit / disputed until you reconcile it. Resolve each: material came back to store, or confirm it as a genuine short / loss.

📈 Productivity Analysis — Planned vs Actual
Productivity = how much of the planned target was actually achieved. Based on planned % vs actual % — not mandays or sq ft formulas.

❓ Help & Guide
Step-by-step guidance for using APM 2.0. Ask a question below, or search/browse topics.

🤖 Help Assistant — how to use APM

AI guidance based on the APM help guide. For actions, follow the steps on the actual screens.

📊 Ask APM — Live Data

Answers from a live, company-wide read-only snapshot (all sites). Money in ₹. Aggregated figures only — no individual wages. "Shortage" = low/zero free stock.
🔑 Change Password
Change your own login password. Use a strong password and keep it confidential.
